Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: A potential customer who has submitted their contact information via the landing page.

name.description: The full name of the lead.

email.description: The email address of the lead.

phone.description: The phone number of the lead.

source.description: Where the lead came from (e.g., 'Hero Form', 'Footer CTA').

createdAt.description: The time the lead was captured.
